news.title: Lumex Announces New Open Access Initiative
news.summary: We are expanding our commitment to open science with a new initiative that will make all publications in our 'Frontiers' series fully open access by 2025.

news.title: Winner of the 2024 Lumex Excellence in Science Award
news.summary: Congratulations to Dr. Elena Rodriguez for her groundbreaking research in sustainable enzymology, which has won this year's Excellence in Science Award.

news.title: Major Update to the Lumex Author Submission Portal
news.summary: We've listened to your feedback! The new author submission portal features a streamlined workflow, direct ORCID integration, and real-time status tracking.

news.title: Call for Papers: Special Issue on Quantum Machine Learning
news.summary: The Journal of Advanced Computing is now accepting submissions for a special issue focusing on the intersection of quantum algorithms and machine learning models.

news.title: Lumex Partners with Global Research Coalition
news.summary: Lumex has joined forces with the Global Research Coalition to improve access to scientific literature for researchers in developing nations.
